subject.description: Geometric pilot head with aviator helmet and opaque visor, simplified to basic shapes, printed in two-color risograph style with visible ink grain and slight misregistration between color layers

scene.location: off-white textured paper background with subtle fiber texture
background_elements: circular arrow loop surrounding pilot head with four stations
every station icon is solid color with orange background
add spacing between the pilot and the circular arrow loop
anvil with hammer icon at left

advanced.color_restriction: two-color risograph only: deep navy blue ink and warm burnt orange ink on off-white paper, halftone dot grain visible, no other colors
